lawsProtected: first-tab Float ID is preserved as evidence
CLIENT SUMMARY rows and V-tab rows are not silently merged
zero-fee nonzero-hour rows are not dropped
source summary rows are non-additive unless explicitly marked additive
non-empty no-job rows are preserved with warnings
pipeline has no department, role, or person attribution
archived production revenue remains source evidence
blank production status becomes UNKNOWN instead of being dropped
unsupported department and role attribution becomes warnings
Float raw task evidence keeps project, task, person, date, hours, and state
inactive and archived Float hours are preserved with warnings
duplicate and manual Float candidates are surfaced without canonical correction
multi-person task splits are marked ambiguous
